openFindings.title: Injection max-length option does not cap the rendered active-goal block
Goal command docs/specs still advertise a bare /goal command after the live router was renamed to /opencode_goal
Replacement goals can be continued after a stale verifier result was intentionally discarded
Prompt enhancement metadata omits the required RICCE marker
Active-goal sanitization is a narrow blacklist before promoting user objective text into system context
Verifier exception messages bypass secret redaction before persistence and injection/status output
Command surface traceability has split into three incompatible names
Overlay catalogs and playbooks point operators at a stale command surface
Current plugin tests do not pin the regression cases for four active behavior/security findings
Prompt-enhancement tests lock CRAFT and DEPTH but not the required RICCE metadata contract
Command and overlay documentation drift has no regression harness in the current test suite
MK_GOAL_PLUGIN_DISABLED documentation overstates the disable boundary
Findings registry drops claim-adjudication fields for active findings
Command contract says unknown verbs fail, but executable instructions treat every unknown non-empty query as a set objective
Generated phase graph metadata includes non-deliverable files as key phase outputs
Graph-metadata deliverable drift is not covered by a phase metadata regression check
/goal set output does not tell users whether it created, replaced, or refreshed a goal
